# PDT Singers — Issue Tracker
# Maintained exclusively by CC (Claude Code). Do not edit manually.
# Last updated: 2026-05-04

001 | DONE   | Portal exit link: no path from member portal back to public site. Add "/" link to portal footer wordmark "Portland DayTime Singers". See also 010. Fixed 2026-04-20: wrapped "Portland DayTime Singers" in footer span as <a href="/"> across all 10 member pages.
002 | DONE   | Logo: new WebP assets from Mercedes Gibson deployed for both cityscape and words portions of hero. Cityscape has residual light halo in dark mode (watercolor wash pixels not fully transparent) — requires source file fix from designer when words transparent file is also delivered. Good enough to ship. Fixed 2026-04-19.
003 | DONE   | "Men who love to sing" headline: force three-line break on desktop. Fixed 2026-04-17.
004 | DONE   | Calendar page: restore h1 colored horizontal border. Fixed 2026-04-17.
005 | DONE   | Calendar "Today" button: dark-mode contrast fix. Fixed 2026-04-17.
006 | DONE   | Mobile: WBQA logo too small and right-justified in hero. Fixed 2026-04-17.
007 | DONE   | Mobile: no path to member portal. Hamburger menu added to all pages. Fixed 2026-04-17.
008 | DONE   | Footer: add home page link on all pages. Fixed 2026-04-17.
009 | DONE   | Calendar: "Today" and "+ New Event" buttons on same horizontal line. Fixed 2026-04-17.
010 | DONE   | Portal footer: wrap "Portland DayTime Singers" wordmark in href="/". Fixed 2026-04-17.
011 | DONE   | Mobile header: quick links — resolved via hamburger menu (option B). Fixed 2026-04-17.
012 | DONE   | Auto-populate Monday rehearsals through end of calendar year via populate-rehearsals.js. Fixed 2026-04-17.
013 | DONE   | Header link: underline "Portland DayTime Singers" as full phrase. Fixed 2026-04-17.
014 | DONE   | Main page: animated photo carousel between hero and CTA. Feeds from /Photos/Mainpage_Carousel/ via Drive proxy. Carousel live on index.html and friends.html. Fixed 2026-05-12 (Sessions 22–23).
015 | DONE   | Photo upload, gallery, curation, and animated carousel full feature. Upload pipeline, photo-proxy, curate-photo Edge Functions live. members/photos.html gallery with event picker, lightbox, admin curation toggle, bulk upload override. HEIC conversion via convert-heic Supabase Edge Function + GitHub Actions (every 15 min). Fixed 2026-05-12 (Sessions 19–24).
016 | DONE   | Music Library: 403 error observed in production on 2026-04-17 when downloading from members/music.html. Root cause: dlUrl() built direct drive.google.com URLs, bypassing the proxy. Initial fix (base64 proxy via serverless function) hit Netlify 6MB response limit immediately (6.5MB MP3 → 413). Final fix: Netlify Edge Function (netlify/edge-functions/drive-music-download.js) streams driveRes.body directly — no buffering, no size ceiling, token stays server-side. drive-music.js now handles listing only. Fixed 2026-04-18. Files: netlify/edge-functions/drive-music-download.js, netlify/functions/drive-music.js, members/music.html, netlify.toml.
017 | DONE   | Attendance: convert to page-level save with batched notifications. HIGH — do before any member uses attendance. Button clicks = local selections only (no Supabase write on click); single Save button batch-writes all changed rows; on success show "Saved ✓". Notification change: remove per-row Supabase webhook; Save handler calls notify-attendance-change Edge Function directly with full batch payload; one email to member + one to director per save. Update Edge Function to accept array payload. UI layout, styling, deep-link behavior, RLS, table structure, pg_cron unaffected. Fixed 2026-04-18. Files: members/attendance.html (save bar UI), members/js/attendance.js (batch upsert + Edge Function call), supabase/functions/notify-attendance-change/index.ts (array payload, member + director emails). ⚠️ Kevin: delete the attendance-change database webhook in Supabase dashboard (no longer needed). Deploy Edge Function: supabase functions deploy notify-attendance-change. Set secret: supabase secrets set RESEND_API_KEY=<key>.
018 | DONE   | performances.html: missing Netlify booking inquiry form. §5e requires a booking/performance inquiry form on the Performances page. Currently the page only has an email link. Add a Netlify Form (name="booking-inquiry") with fields: name, email, organization/venue, preferred date, message. Fixed 2026-04-20.
019 | DONE | friends.html: Facebook CTA button updated with live PDT Singers Facebook page URL. Fixed 2026-04-20.
020 | DONE   | index.html: nav-brand is a <div> not an <a href="/"> — the home page logo/wordmark is not a clickable link. All other pages correctly use <a href="/" class="nav-brand">. Fix: change <div class="nav-brand"> to <a href="/" class="nav-brand">. Fixed 2026-04-20.
021 | DONE   | members/index.html line 79: "Mark myself absent" button has class pdt-admin-only — only admins see it on the dashboard. All active members should be able to mark themselves absent from the next-rehearsal card. Remove pdt-admin-only class. Fixed 2026-04-20.
022 | DONE   | members/music.html line 342: voice pill only adds a pdt:profile-loaded event listener; never checks window.__PDT_USER directly first. Convention violation (pdt-conventions.md §Role Visibility Pattern) — voice pill silently absent if profile loaded before listener is attached. Fix: check window.__PDT_USER first, fall back to event. Fixed 2026-04-20.
023 | CLOSED | Pass-1 false positive: events.html save payload includes event_date field — confirmed in Pass-2 live test that posts table DOES have an event_date column. No issue.
024 | DONE   | seed-members.mjs: untracked file contains 15 member names and email addresses (PII). Added to .gitignore 2026-04-19 to prevent accidental commit.
025 | DONE   | members/resources.html: listed in requirements §4.2 as a member-only page but the file does not exist and the member nav has no Resources link. Phase 2 item — log for tracking. Fixed 2026-04-20: created resources.html (placeholder, auth-guarded) and added Resources nav link to all 9 member pages.
026 | CLOSED | Kevin Bier profile: role and voice_part already correct in production (role='admin', voice_part='bass'). Issue was written before profile was manually fixed. Verified 2026-05-12.
027 | DONE   | "Music Fairy" account (id: e94f7959, role=admin, created 2026-03-29) appears to be an early test account with no voice_part. Kevin to decide: rename, demote, or deactivate. Currently active with admin privileges. Resolved 2026-04-19: migrated to tech@pdtsingers.org; profile updated in Supabase (full_name='Tech Support', role='admin', is_active=true). Workspace-level forwarding confirmed: tech@pdtsingers.org → k7vi@pm.me via Admin Console routing map.
028 | OPEN   | Migrate all website tool accounts to tech@pdtsingers.org. Scope: Netlify, Supabase, GitHub, GCP (project pdt-singers-music-library + service account pdt-music-library@pdt-singers-music-library.iam.gserviceaccount.com), Resend, helpinghosting.com. Google Workspace ownership stays with president@ — no action needed there. Do one service at a time; verify login before moving to the next.
029 | CLOSED | Workspace email forwarding: ops procedure, not a tracked bug. Instructions documented in pdt-tech-maintainers-guide.md §2. Implement on-demand when a pdtsingers.org address needs forwarding configured.
030 | CLOSED | HC member email forwarding: ops procedure, not a tracked bug. Instructions documented in pdt-tech-maintainers-guide.md §2. Coordinate with each HC member when they want their pdtsingers.org address active.
031 | OPEN | FWI-A: Attendance escalation pipeline. Context: event_attendance table has status values attending/not_sure/not_attending. notify-attendance-change Edge Function handles save-time notification only (member confirmation + director summary for non-rehearsal events). Escalation pipeline is designed but entirely undeployed. Migration file 20260417_attendance.sql has a commented-out cron.schedule() call with YOUR_PROJECT_REF and YOUR_ANON_KEY placeholders — fill those in and uncomment after deploying the Edge Function. A send-attendance-emails Edge Function needs to be written from scratch: receives pg_cron trigger, finds sing-out events where event_date - today = 10 with status = not_sure, sends Resend reminder email to member. At 7 days: auto-marks to not_attending, notifies member they've been auto-marked, notifies Chris. Director notification pattern mirrors existing director summary in notify-attendance-change. Verify old attendance-change database webhook deleted in Supabase dashboard (issue #017).
032 | DONE   | FWI-B: Admin attendance override. Context: Admin sets attendance state on behalf of a member — use case is Kevin transcribing clipboard absences from rehearsal. Lives in admin panel, not attendance page. UI: pick active member (dropdown from profiles where is_active=true), pick future event (dropdown, same rehearsal vs. sing-out segmentation as attendance page), set status (three-way for sing-outs, two-way for rehearsals), optional reason, Save. Upsert to event_attendance — same table, same columns as member-facing attendance. RLS needs admin_insert_any policy analogous to absences_delete_admin pattern. Attendance page JS segmentation logic and save/notify pattern from attendance.js are directly reusable. Notify Chris on save for non-rehearsal events via existing notify-attendance-change Edge Function — admin saves indistinguishable from member saves from notification perspective. Fixed 2026-04-25. Sing-outs only (rehearsal absences handled by separate mechanism); override section gated to admin role only (not musical_director). admin_override flag in Edge Function payload skips member email, sends director-only summary with overridden member name noted. Files: members/admin-attendance.html, members/js/admin-attendance.js, supabase/migrations/20260425120000_event_attendance_admin_insert.sql, supabase/functions/notify-attendance-change/index.ts, css/attendance.css.
033 | DONE   | FWI-C: Sing-out attendance report. Context: Admin or director needs a report for any sing-out showing all three voting states plus members who haven't voted. Data in event_attendance joined to profiles. Query: for a given event_id, left-join all active members against event_attendance — members with no row are No Response. Display: four sections — Attending, Not Sure, Not Attending, No Response — each with member names and reasons where applicable. Accessible to admin and musical_director roles (RLS already allows both to read event_attendance). Logical home is admin panel or dedicated report page. No new schema work required. Fixed 2026-04-25: renderReport() rewritten — four-bucket vertical layout replacing 2×2 grid; empty buckets collapse entirely; status-color-coded labels (sage/gold/warm/muted); reasons shown as indented secondary lines; members sorted by last name within each bucket; ?event= deep-link support preserved. renderBucket() helper extracted. Files: members/js/admin-attendance.js, css/attendance.css.
034 | DONE   | New Event form: width. The New Event form should be no wider than the minimum window width. Currently it can exceed viewport width on small screens. Fixed 2026-04-24: added style="max-width: 480px;" to the .post-modal div; .post-modal-overlay already has padding: var(--space-lg) on all sides so modal never bleeds on any screen width. File: members/calendar.html.
035 | DONE   | New Event form: Cancel button color. The Cancel button is the same color as the form background — invisible. Should match the style of the buttons immediately above the form at the bottom of the calendar page. Fixed 2026-04-25: changed .btn-secondary background from transparent to #f0f0f0 in members.css — applies to all secondary/cancel buttons in all modals.
036 | DONE   | New Event form + DB: additional time fields. Fixed 2026-04-25: (1) "Start time" label renamed to "Event begins at". (2) call_time already in DB — wired into form (id="event-call-time") and detail panel. (3) on_stage column added by migration — wired into form (id="event-on-stage") and detail panel. Both fields shown only when event_type=performance (perf-times-section div, toggled by event-type change listener). Detail panel: call_time row hidden if null; on_stage row always shown for performances ("same as show time" if null). Save payload sends null for both when not a performance. Files: members/calendar.html, css/calendar.css.
037 | DONE   | Tech maintainer's guide: Claude.ai MCP connectors section. Fixed 2026-04-25: added §15 to pdt-tech-maintainers-guide.md documenting Google Drive (disconnected), Gmail (disconnected), and Stripe (not relevant) with when-to-use guidance and connector management instructions.
038 | DONE   | Mobile: hamburger menu not opening. Root causes: (1) css/main.css 720px responsive block set .nav-links { display: none } without the matching .nav-links.is-open override, leaving the open state fighting a later CSS rule; (2) nav.js click handler had no null guard for navLinks — silent TypeError if element missing. Fix: removed stray .nav-links rule from 720px block (768px block handles it correctly with both states); added null guard to nav.js IIFE. Fixed 2026-04-23.
039 | DONE   | Mobile: hamburger nav dropdown transparent / unreadable over hero. When .nav-links.is-open overflowed below the site-nav's fixed height box, the overflow had no background. Fix: added background: var(--forest) and z-index: 100 to .nav-links.is-open in the 768px media query; added rgba(255,255,255,0.8) link color and #ffffff hover for readability on dark background. Fixed 2026-04-23.
040 | DONE   | Footer Navigate section missing Member Portal link. All 7 public-page footers (index, about, performances, join, friends, contact, music) lacked a link to /members/. Added as last item in the Navigate list, styled by existing .footer-col ul li a rule. Fixed 2026-04-23.
041 | DONE   | Dark mode: hamburger icon invisible on public pages. var(--forest) is #1a1a1a (near-black, not overridden in dark mode); the dark mode site-nav background is #111 — spans invisible against it. Member portal forces color-scheme: light so never affected. Fix: added .nav-hamburger span { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85) } to dark mode Nav section in main.css. Fixed 2026-04-23.
042 | DONE   | Login: add 60-second cooldown timer to the OTP / login link request button — disable immediately on click, show countdown ('Resend in 47s…'), re-enable at 0. Prevents users from requesting multiple codes and inadvertently invalidating the previous one. Supabase enforces a 60s rate limit server-side; the UI should reflect this. Fixed 2026-04-25: startCooldown()/clearCooldown() helpers added; countdown fires after successful signInWithOtp in OTP mode; Back link calls clearCooldown() to reset immediately. File: login.html.
043 | DONE   | Footer home links: Standardize footer link labels across all pages. Fixed 2026-04-25: 8 member portal pages updated from 'Portal Home' to 'Members Only Portal Home'; members/index.html footer fixed (label 'Home' → 'Members Only Portal Home', destination '/' → '/members/'); 6 public pages updated from 'Home' to 'PDT Singers Home'. Nav bar links untouched. sunburst.html was already correct. Files: members/{index,calendar,events,attendance,comms,directors-notes,poohbah,resources,music}.html, {about,contact,performances,friends,join,music}.html.
044 | DONE   | Member portal nav: Nav menu items are left-justified on member portal pages but right-justified on public pages. Fixed 2026-04-25: public pages use justify-content: space-between on .site-nav to push .nav-links right; member portal .member-nav-links uses flex: 1 with default flex-start. Fix: added justify-content: flex-end to .member-nav-links desktop rule; added justify-content: flex-start override in the mobile media query to preserve correct dropdown stacking. File: css/members.css.
045 | DONE   | Member portal page layout: Headlines and body text on member portal pages (excluding the dashboard/home page) do not match the layout of public pages — different margins, padding, max-width, or heading styles. Fixed 2026-04-24: added max-width: var(--max-width); margin: 0 auto to .blog-header-inner in blog.css so all blog-header pages constrain their headline/byline to the same max-width as resources.html; also added missing blog.css link to calendar.html. Files: css/blog.css, members/calendar.html.
046 | DONE   | Calendar: When an admin marks an event as cancelled, prompt them to post a cancellation notice to the Events blog. Fixed 2026-04-25: after successful update where is_cancelled flips from false → true, blog-prompt-modal shows "Post a cancellation notice to the Events page for [title]?" for admin/calendar_manager only. "Yes, create post" navigates to events.html?new=1 with title prefixed "Cancellation: ", boilerplate notes, event_date, event_id, start_time, location. Reuses existing blog-prompt-modal and ?new=1 detection from #047. blogPromptMode variable ('new-event'|'cancellation') controls prompt text and URL param construction. prevWasCancelled tracked in openEventModal. File: members/calendar.html.
047 | DONE   | Calendar: When an admin creates a new Performance or Social Event, prompt them to post it to the Events blog. Fixed 2026-04-25: after successful insert of performance/social event, blog-prompt-modal appears for admin/calendar_manager/events_editor. "Yes, create post" navigates to events.html?new=1 with title, event_date, event_id, start_time, location, notes as URL params; events.html detects ?new=1 and calls openModal() with pre-populated fields. event_id stored in hidden #post-event-id field but NOT yet written to posts table — column missing (see issue #053). Files: members/calendar.html, members/events.html.
048 | CLOSED | Supabase free-tier cold-start slow first load. Accepted as known behavior — performance is real-time once loaded. Closed 2026-04-26.
049 | DONE   | Attendance: Save button grayed out on page load when no prior status saved. Root cause: loadEvent() set c.startStatus = 'attending' (the UI default) even when no DB record exists, so isDirty() returned false and Save stayed disabled. Fix: set c.startStatus = null when no prior record; isDirty() returns true when startStatus === null; loadEvent() calls updateSaveBtn() instead of hardcoding disabled=true. Fixed 2026-04-24. File: members/js/attendance.js.
050 | DONE   | Music Library: page header block (title, subtitle, voice-part badge) had no left margin — flush against left window edge. Root cause: .music-header CSS had padding: ... 0 ... (zero horizontal padding) and the inner .container div had no CSS definition. Fix: added var(--space-lg) horizontal padding to .music-header; added .music-header > .container { max-width: var(--max-width); margin: 0 auto } to the inline style block. Fixed 2026-04-24. File: members/music.html.
051 | DONE   | The Sunburst newsletter blog added to member portal. New page members/sunburst.html (blog_type='sunburst', admin-only posting, gold accent #c4a24a, auth-gated). Nav link "The Sunburst" added after Comms, before Calendar on all 10 member portal pages. No schema change required — posts table blog_type column is unconstrained text. Fixed 2026-04-24. Files: members/sunburst.html, members/{all 10 nav pages}.
052 | DONE   | README rewrite. Fixed 2026-04-25: replaced early-dev scaffolding placeholder with full onboarding doc covering stack, local dev, deploy, env vars, project structure, key docs, member roles, and Music Library architecture.
053 | DONE   | posts table: add event_id column (uuid, nullable, FK → events(id) on delete set null). Migration run; events.html submit handler wired; TODO removed. Fixed 2026-04-25.
054 | DONE   | Calendar: events_editor role sees + New Event button but cannot create events — RLS blocks the insert. Root cause: #047 added events_editor to the New Event button visibility (calendar.html:325–326) so they could trigger the blog-post prompt, but events_insert_admin_or_manager policy only allows admin + calendar_manager. Fixed 2026-04-25: removed events_editor from New Event button visibility (option A — visibility restricted to admin + calendar_manager, matching RLS). File: members/calendar.html.
055 | DONE   | Member portal nav: "Home" label renamed to "Member Home" across all 10 member pages (comms.html had two nav lists — both updated). Fixed 2026-04-25.
056 | DONE   | Member portal nav: links clipped and inaccessible between 769px–1300px window width. Root cause: 10 white-space:nowrap items need ~1300px; overflow-x:auto on the outer container wasn't triggering because .member-nav-links flex:1 absorbed space internally, silently clipping items. Fix: raised hamburger breakpoint from 768px to 1100px so the existing working dropdown activates sooner; removed redundant display:none from the 600px block. Fixed 2026-04-25. File: css/members.css.
057 | DONE   | directors-notes blog_type constraint mismatch. directors-notes.html was posting blog_type='directors_notes' (underscore) but posts_blog_type_check constraint only allowed 'directors-notes' (hyphen). Fixed by dropping and recreating constraint with correct values: directors_notes, poohbah, events, sunburst. No data migration needed — no rows existed with the hyphen form. Fixed 2026-04-25.
058 | CLOSED | members/whats-new.html member changelog — retired as a planned feature. Not needed. Closed 2026-04-26.
059 | FUTURE  | Donation page: Add a member portal donation page powered by Stripe. Features: donation form (amount, donor info), Stripe payment processing, automatic deposit to PDT credit union operating account, confirmation email to donor suitable for 501(c)(3) tax purposes (PDT is a confirmed 501(c)(3)). No due date — idea-stage only. Design TBD. Note: update §16 of pdt-tech-maintainers-guide.md to change Stripe connector status from "Not relevant" to "Reserved for future donation feature" when implementation begins.

## #060 — Clean up pdtsingers.music@gmail.com GCP ownership
Post-release. pdtsingers.music@gmail.com (a recovered deleted account) is currently
co-Owner of pdt-singers-music-library GCP project. tech@pdtsingers.org is now the
primary Owner. Remove pdtsingers.music@gmail.com from IAM once confirmed everything
works under tech@pdtsingers.org. Do not remove until post-release verification complete.

061 | DONE | GitHub repo transferred to PDT-tech org. Netlify rebound. Complete as of Session 25 (2026-05-12).

062 | DONE   | Events page: post displays created_at date instead of event_date. Fixed 2026-04-28: Events detail now reads event_date from events table via event_id FK; falls back to post created_at when event_id is null. File: members/events.html.

063 | DONE   | Events page: event times displayed with seconds (HH:MM:SS). Fixed 2026-04-27. calendar.html formatTime() already correct (destructures [h,m] only). attendance.js and admin-attendance.js formatTime() already correct. events.html line 295: trimmed start_time URL param to .slice(0,5) before inserting into post body template. File: members/events.html.

064 | OPEN | Events page edits do not reflect on Calendar. Editing a post title or body on events.html does not update the linked calendar event row. This is a known architectural issue — posts and events are separate DB rows linked by event_id. Two-way sync is not currently implemented. Resolution: deferred pending discussion of #071 (Calendar/Events architecture decision). Do not fix in isolation — see #071.

065 | DONE   | Duplicate event constraint error is user-hostile and incorrectly blocks valid data. Fixed 2026-04-27. Migration: dropped events_event_type_event_date_key; created partial unique index events_rehearsal_date_key ON events(event_date) WHERE event_type='rehearsal'. calendar.html: save handler catches Postgres 23505 errors (and message containing "unique") — shows "A rehearsal is already scheduled for that date…" instead of raw DB text; added #event-save-error display element in form. ⚠️ Kevin: run migration 20260427_fix_rehearsal_unique_constraint.sql in Supabase SQL editor before deploying. Files: supabase/migrations/20260427_fix_rehearsal_unique_constraint.sql, members/calendar.html.

066 | DONE   | Calendar event detail popup: sing-out attendance shows "I won't be there" button instead of the three-state dropdown used on attendance.html. Fixed 2026-04-27. Rehearsal events: unchanged (absence table, two-state buttons). Non-rehearsal events: replaced absence CTA with #dm-attendance-cta — attending/not_sure/not_attending select, optional reason field (shown when not attending/not sure), Save button. Reads/writes event_attendance table via upsert. Pre-populates from existing record on panel open via loadAttendanceRecord(). No Edge Function call. File: members/calendar.html.

067 | DONE   | Calendar sing-out events: field display order, hide time range, add Outfit field. Fixed 2026-04-27 (retry — previous attempt did not land form changes). Form: start/end time wrapped in #non-perf-times-section, hidden when event_type=performance; Outfit? text input (id=event-dress-code) added to perf-times-section; dress_code in save payload (null for non-performance); pre-populated on edit. Detail panel: time row suppressed for performance (ev.event_type !== 'performance' guard); call_time and on_stage each shown only if non-null; dress_code row (#dm-dress-code-row) added after on_stage, shown if non-null. File: members/calendar.html.

068 | OPEN | Deleting an Events page post linked to a calendar event should offer to delete the calendar event too. When admin deletes a post from events.html that has a non-null event_id, show a confirmation modal: "This post is linked to a calendar event. Delete the calendar event too? [Delete both] [Delete post only]". If "Delete both": delete from events table first (cascade will handle absences and event_attendance), then delete the post. If "Delete post only": delete post only — event_id FK is already ON DELETE SET NULL so events row is unaffected. File: members/events.html.

069 | DONE   | Member portal nav: remove "MEMBERS" link from member nav header. Removed <span class="member-badge">Members</span> from inside the nav brand link — it was redundant with the brand destination. Fixed 2026-04-27. Files: members/{index,calendar,events,attendance,directors-notes,poohbah,music,sunburst,photos,resources,admin-attendance}.html.

070 | DONE   | Events page post detail: remove creator name; add event_date, call_time, on_stage. Fixed 2026-04-28: Author name removed from detail view; call_time and on_stage added (HH:MM format, hidden when null). File: members/events.html.

071 | DESIGN | Calendar/Events architecture: Option C selected — retire Events blog posts, make Events page a calendar-driven view with optional editorial narrative. Decision: Events page (members/events.html) will render directly from the events table filtered to performance and social event_types, not from the posts table. The posts table blog_type='events' rows will be migrated and retired. Schema change required: add public_notes column (text, nullable) to events table — this is the editorial/narrative field (separate from notes, which is operational). The create/edit calendar form gets an "Event description / public announcement" textarea mapped to public_notes. Events page renders: event_date, title, location, call_time, on_stage, dress_code, and public_notes as prose body. If public_notes is null, event still displays with structured fields only. Author attribution removed (no posted_by on events). Events are always published once created (no per-event draft/publish toggle). Migration: for existing events posts with a non-null event_id FK, copy post body into events.public_notes, then delete those post rows. Orphaned events posts (no event_id) reviewed manually. Moss's workflow moves to the calendar create/edit form. Do not implement #064 or #068 — they become moot under Option C. Implement #070 as part of this work (remove author name, add event_date + times from events table). Implementation order: (a) migration adding public_notes column, (b) calendar.html form update, (c) events.html rewrite as calendar view, (d) data migration script, (e) remove events rows from posts table. Flag: this is a significant refactor — implement as a dedicated session after #065 and #066 are resolved.

072 | DONE   | Member Home: upcoming events list items are not clickable. Fixed 2026-04-27. Upcoming Events card switched from querying posts table to querying events table directly (non-rehearsal, non-cancelled, upcoming, limit 3). Items rendered as <a> links to calendar.html?event=<uuid>. calendar.html detects ?event param on load: if event in current month opens panel immediately; if in different month navigates there first then opens panel. Silently ignores unknown IDs. Files: members/index.html, members/calendar.html, css/members.css.

073 | DONE   | Member portal nav: change "Portland DayTime Singers" brand label to "PDT Singers" on all member pages. Fixed 2026-04-27. Files: members/{index,calendar,events,attendance,directors-notes,poohbah,music,sunburst,photos,resources,admin-attendance}.html.

074 | DONE   | Member Home: Director and Poohbah blog cards not clickable. Latest post cards on members/index.html are static. Each should link to the blog page with that post's modal open (?post=<uuid> deep-link pattern, matching #072). Fixed 2026-04-27. loadRecentPosts() renders items as <a> links when blogPageUrl provided; directors-notes.html and poohbah.html detect ?post param on load and call openPost(). Files: members/index.html, members/directors-notes.html, members/poohbah.html, css/members.css.
